nodes.name: Blue-throated brown sunbird
nodes.summary: Blue-throated brown sunbird（Cyanomitra cyanolaema）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-throated brown sunbird。

nodes.name: Cyanomitra
nodes.summary: Cyanomitra（Cyanomitra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Green-headed sunbird、Bannerman's sunbird、Blue-throated brown sunbird等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-throated brown sunbird
nodes.summary: The blue-throated brown sunbird (Cyanomitra cyanolaema) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest. References
